meanings.definition: the entering of a legal document into the public record
a fragment rubbed off by the use of a file
the act of using a file (as in shaping or smoothing an object)
preservation and methodical arrangement as of documents and papers etc.
examples: I have some filing to do

meanings.definition: record in a public office or in a court of law

examples: The students filed into the classroom
The suspect was charged with murdering his wife

meanings.definition: place in a container for keeping records
